Returns Policy

Free replacement within 3 days for damaged, defective, or incorrect items.

Here's a summary of Furniva's refund and return process.

We offer a free replacement within 3 days of delivery in the unlikely event that you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item.

How to Report an Issue

Email us at support@furniva.in with details and images of the product. In some cases, we may schedule a technician visit to evaluate the product. Based on the technician's report, we will offer a replacement, repair, or a partial refund as per your choice. Full replacements are offered if a repair isn't feasible.

If We Cannot Replace the Product

We'll arrange a free return pickup and process a full refund once the item arrives back at our warehouse. To ensure a smooth return, please keep the item in its original condition with all original packaging, manuals, warranty cards, and accessories intact.

For any additional questions, feel free to contact us at support@furniva.in.
